description: Partnerships + Affiliate programs: crecimiento externo. Alianzas ganar-ganar, comisiones, co-marketing.

items.principle: Affiliate: otros (bloggers, creators, sellers) venden tu producto, ganan comisión. Costo solo en ventas, no fixed. Ideal para escalar.
items.tactic: Comisión: 20-50% típico (depende margen). Proveedor afiliados: Shareasale, Impact, CJ (B2B), Awin (global). Crear landing 'Become affiliate' → link único → tracking → pagos mensuales.
items.framework: Affiliate program → Recruitment → Commission tracking → Payments
examples: SaaS $100/mes. Affiliate comisión 30% = $30/new customer. Afiliado obtiene 50 clientes/mes = $1500/mes (passive). SaaS: +50 MRR @ $100 = +$5000/mes.
E-commerce: Producto $50, margen $20. Affiliate comisión 40% = $8/venta. 100 afiliados activos × 2 ventas/mes = 200 ventas = $1600 ingresos afiliados sin gasto en ads.

items.principle: Partnerships: Co-branding, cross-sell, joint ventures. Ejemplo: Seller zapatos + seller carteras → Bundle 'Matching set', ambos ganan.
items.tactic: Identificar complementario (no competitor). Propuesta: 'Your product + my product = bundle. 30% extra margen cada uno'. Ej: Consultor + agencia design → 'Done-for-you branding'.
items.framework: Identify complementary product → Propose bundle or co-go-to-market → Split revenue or commission
examples: E-commerce A (zapatos) + E-commerce B (medias): Bundle 'Starter outfit' ($100 zapatos + $20 medias = $120). A gana $30 margen + $10 bundle bonus. B gana $10 margen + $5 bundle bonus. Win-win.
Consultant + Agency: Consultant refers 'Need website?' → Agency builds → Agency refers 'Need business strategy?' → Consultant. Referral revenue both.
